name: All-American Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first nine ingredients in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Shape the mixture into two 7 1/2 x 4-inch loaves and place them on a lightly greased rack in a broiler pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
4. In a small bowl, combine half a cup of catsup, one tablespoon of horseradish, and the remaining ingredients (brown sugar, mustard).
5. Spread the mixture over the meatloaf.
6. Return to the oven and bake an additional 5 minutes.
7. Yields 2 loaves. NOTE: May freeze the second loaf.
